# PERF-169 positive: atomic.Value.Store called inside a loop (allocates an eface per call)
lang: go
file: PERF-169-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"sync/atomic"
)

type Config struct {
	Limit int
}

var cfg atomic.Value

func UpdateLimits(values []int) {
	for _, v := range values {
		cfg.Store(Config{Limit: v})
	}
}
